commands.review_summary:
The PR adds repeatable/comma-separated filters for provider kind, target, raw feature, workspace capability, and evidence capability to `crabbox providers`, with docs and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new `crabbox providers` filter surface rather than fixing a bug. The diff includes focused unit coverage for JSON filtering, AND semantics, and unknown filter rejection.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is appropriate because this is a maintainer-authored draft feature PR with no concrete review finding to automate.

target.title: feat(cli): filter provider capabilities
target.body:
## Summary
- add static `crabbox providers` filters for provider kind, target, raw feature, normalized workspace capability, and normalized evidence capability
- validate filter values against the compiled provider matrix so typos fail clearly
- document repeatable/comma-separated filter semantics

## Verification
- `go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestProviders'`
- `node scripts/check-command-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-links.mjs`
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- `bin/crabbox providers --kind delegated-run --target linux --evidence preview-url`
- `bin/crabbox providers --workspace checkpoint,fork --json | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d).on("end",()=>{const a=JSON.parse(s); if(!a.length) throw new Error("empty"); for (const p of a) { if (!p.workspace?.includes("checkpoint") || !p.workspace?.includes("fork")) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(p)); } console.log(a.map(p=>p.provider).join(","));})'`
- `bin/crabbox providers --evidence memory-fork >/tmp/crabbox-filter-out 2>/tmp/crabbox-filter-err; rc=$?; printf 'rc=%s\n' "$rc"; cat /tmp/crabbox-filter-err; test "$rc" -eq 2`
- `go test ./...`

No live provider credentials were used.
target.author: vincentkoc
